positive: Build a hierarchical Bayesian model in PyMC and check NUTS diagnostics.
Review this PyMC model for prior predictive checks, divergences, and posterior predictive validation.
negative: Run a frequentist OLS regression with coefficient tables in statsmodels.
Explain basic probability concepts without building a model.
near_miss: Compare Bayesian models from Stan output using ArviZ diagnostics.
Choose an appropriate statistical test for two groups.
notes: Use pymc when PyMC implementation or review is central; route broader PPL diagnostics to bayesian-ppl-diagnostics.
